calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on a regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Petitioner, Mandy Lee Van Zytveld present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the decree changing name to Amanda Lee Nelson.
Decree signed in open court.
